agent_trace.summary: [发令中] 已发布Palantir营收CAGR计算征调令，明确目标与边界。

updates.total_target: 计算Palantir Technologies (PLTR) 2022年至2024年两年的复合年均收入增长率 (CAGR)。

boundaries.scope: 任务范围严格限定为Palantir Technologies (PLTR) 的公开可查收入数据。
boundaries.data_years: 必须使用2022财年和2024财年的总收入数据。
boundaries.calculation_method: 必须采用复合年均增长率 (CAGR) 公式进行计算。
prohibitions: 不得使用非公开或未经审计的数据。
不得偏离指定的2022年和2024年财年范围。
不得进行超出CAGR计算范围的市场分析或预测。

meta.stage_description: 大汗发布征调令并定义边界。

agent_trace.summary: [已完成] PLTR CAGR计算万户级配额与分解口径已制定。

tumen_quota.objective: 收集并核实Palantir Technologies (PLTR) 2022财年和2024财年的年度营收数据。
使用Tumen_001提供的2022和2024营收数据，计算PLTR的两年复合年增长率 (CAGR)。
deliverables: 计算出的两年营收CAGR (百分比)

updates.decomposition_rule: 每个万户 (Tumen) 需将其分配到的目标进一步分解为最多10个千户 (Mingghan) 任务。此1:10的分解比例必须递归保持，直至十户 (Arban) 级别。

reporting_cycle.completion_target: 自任务分配起1个工作日内完成。
reporting_cycle.report_content: 核实后的2022和2024营收数据，以及数据来源。

reporting_cycle.completion_target: 在Tumen_001交付物可用后1个工作日内完成。
reporting_cycle.report_content: 最终CAGR百分比，计算步骤，以及使用的输入数据。

updates.decomposition_rule: 每个万户 (Tumen) 需将其分配到的目标进一步分解为最多10个千户 (Mingghan) 任务。此1:10的分解比例必须递归保持，直至十户 (Arban) 级别。

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 正在将Palantir CAGR计算任务分解为十个千户子任务。

mingghan_allocations.task: Identify primary financial reporting sources for Palantir (PLTR).
mingghan_allocations.description: Locate official investor relations pages, SEC filings (10-K), and reputable financial news outlets (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters, Yahoo Finance) for PLTR.

mingghan_allocations.task: Retrieve Palantir's (PLTR) total revenue for the fiscal year 2022.
mingghan_allocations.description: Access identified sources to find and record the official total revenue figure for PLTR for the fiscal year ending in 2022.

mingghan_allocations.task: Verify and cross-reference PLTR 2022 revenue data.
mingghan_allocations.description: Compare the retrieved 2022 revenue figure across at least two independent reliable sources to ensure accuracy and consistency.

mingghan_allocations.task: Retrieve Palantir's (PLTR) total revenue for the fiscal year 2024.
mingghan_allocations.description: Access identified sources to find and record the official total revenue figure for PLTR for the fiscal year ending in 2024.

mingghan_allocations.task: Verify and cross-reference PLTR 2024 revenue data.
mingghan_allocations.description: Compare the retrieved 2024 revenue figure across at least two independent reliable sources to ensure accuracy and consistency.

mingghan_allocations.task: Confirm Palantir's fiscal year reporting calendar.
mingghan_allocations.description: Ascertain whether PLTR operates on a standard calendar year or a different fiscal year cycle to ensure correct period alignment for 2022 and 2024 data.

mingghan_allocations.task: Calculate the 2-year Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR).
mingghan_allocations.description: Apply the CAGR formula: (Revenue_2024 / Revenue_2022)^(1/2) - 1 using the verified revenue figures.

mingghan_allocations.task: Perform a qualitative check on the calculated CAGR.
mingghan_allocations.description: Assess if the calculated CAGR is within a reasonable range given general market conditions and PLTR's known performance, potentially comparing with industry benchmarks or analyst consensus if easily accessible.

mingghan_allocations.task: Document all data sources and extracted revenue figures.
mingghan_allocations.description: Compile a clear record of URLs, report names, and the specific revenue numbers used for 2022 and 2024, including any notes on discrepancies or assumptions.

mingghan_allocations.task: Prepare a concise report summarizing the 2-year revenue CAGR for PLTR.
mingghan_allocations.description: Generate a final output detailing the calculated CAGR, the input revenue figures, the period covered, and any relevant caveats.

risks: Data source inconsistency risk: Different financial reporting sources might present slightly varied revenue figures.
2024 financial report availability risk: Although 2024 annual reports should be available by March 2026, there's a minor risk of delayed or preliminary data affecting accuracy.

meta.stage_description: 万户级执行并向下分解到千户级。

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 已将Palantir 2-Year Revenue CAGR 2022-2024任务分解为十个百户子任务。

jaghun_allocations.title: Identify 2022 PLTR Revenue Report
jaghun_allocations.description: Locate primary official financial reports (e.g., 10-K, annual reports) for Palantir's 2022 fiscal year.

jaghun_allocations.title: Extract 2022 PLTR Total Revenue
jaghun_allocations.description: From the identified official reports, precisely extract Palantir's total revenue for the 2022 fiscal year.

jaghun_allocations.title: Verify 2022 PLTR Revenue Data
jaghun_allocations.description: Cross-reference the extracted 2022 revenue figure with at least one independent, reliable financial data source (e.g., reputable financial news, investor sites).

jaghun_allocations.title: Identify 2024 PLTR Revenue Report
jaghun_allocations.description: Locate primary official financial reports (e.g., 10-K, earnings releases) for Palantir's 2024 fiscal year. If full-year 2024 is not available, identify the latest available full-year data and note the discrepancy.

jaghun_allocations.title: Extract 2024 PLTR Total Revenue
jaghun_allocations.description: From the identified official reports, precisely extract Palantir's total revenue for the 2024 fiscal year (or latest full-year available).

jaghun_allocations.title: Verify 2024 PLTR Revenue Data
jaghun_allocations.description: Cross-reference the extracted 2024 revenue figure with at least one independent, reliable financial data source.

jaghun_allocations.title: Confirm CAGR Period Definition
jaghun_allocations.description: Explicitly confirm the start and end years for the CAGR calculation (2022 and 2024) and the number of periods (2 years).

jaghun_allocations.title: Document CAGR Formula Requirements
jaghun_allocations.description: Detail the specific formula for 2-year CAGR and list all required input variables.

jaghun_allocations.title: Consolidate Revenue Data for Calculation
jaghun_allocations.description: Compile the verified 2022 and 2024 revenue figures into a structured format ready for input into the CAGR formula.

jaghun_allocations.title: Prepare Initial Calculation Environment
jaghun_allocations.description: Set up any necessary tools or templates for executing the CAGR calculation in the next stage, without performing the calculation itself.

meta.stage_description: 千户级执行并向下分解到百户级。

agent_trace.summary: [执行中] 已将Palantir 2-Year Revenue CAGR 2022-2024任务分解为十个十户子任务。

arban_allocations.title: Research PLTR 2022 Full-Year Revenue from Official Reports
arban_allocations.description: Identify and extract Palantir Technologies (PLTR) full-year revenue for 2022 from official financial reports (e.g., 10-K filings, annual reports).

arban_allocations.title: Research PLTR 2022 Full-Year Revenue from Reputable News Outlets
arban_allocations.description: Gather Palantir Technologies (PLTR) full-year revenue for 2022 from at least two reputable financial news sources (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters, Wall Street Journal).

arban_allocations.title: Cross-Verify PLTR 2022 Revenue Data from Third-Party Financial Data Sources
arban_allocations.description: Verify the 2022 full-year revenue figure for Palantir Technologies (PLTR) using a third independent financial data platform (e.g., Yahoo Finance, Google Finance, Refinitiv).

arban_allocations.title: Research PLTR 2024 Full-Year Revenue Guidance/Actuals from Official Reports
arban_allocations.description: Identify and extract Palantir Technologies (PLTR) full-year revenue guidance or actuals for 2024 from official investor presentations, earnings call transcripts, or the latest available 10-K/Q filings.

arban_allocations.title: Research PLTR 2024 Full-Year Revenue Guidance/Actuals from Reputable News Outlets
arban_allocations.description: Gather Palantir Technologies (PLTR) full-year revenue guidance or actuals for 2024 from at least two reputable financial news sources.

arban_allocations.title: Cross-Verify PLTR 2024 Revenue Data from Third-Party Financial Data Sources
arban_allocations.description: Verify the 2024 full-year revenue guidance or actuals for Palantir Technologies (PLTR) using a third independent financial data platform.

arban_allocations.title: Identify and Document CAGR Calculation Parameters
arban_allocations.description: Clearly identify and document the starting revenue figure (2022), the ending revenue figure (2024), and the number of periods (years) required for the Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) calculation.

arban_allocations.title: Consolidate and Validate 2022 PLTR Revenue Figure
arban_allocations.description: Review and consolidate all collected 2022 revenue data for Palantir Technologies (PLTR), validate the most reliable figure, and note any significant discrepancies or assumptions made.

arban_allocations.title: Consolidate and Validate 2024 PLTR Revenue Figure
arban_allocations.description: Review and consolidate all collected 2024 revenue data/guidance for Palantir Technologies (PLTR), validate the most reliable figure, and note any significant discrepancies or assumptions made.

arban_allocations.title: Calculate PLTR 2-Year Revenue CAGR (2022-2024)
arban_allocations.description: Perform the final Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) calculation for Palantir Technologies (PLTR) using the validated 2022 and 2024 revenue figures over the 2-year period, and report the result.

updates.readiness: All 10 arban-level subtasks are defined and ready for assignment.

updates.household_mobilization: 任务类型为财务计算（Palantir 2-Year Revenue CAGR），非户级动员，故无法执行户级动员操作。
updates.blockers: 当前阶段（arban_level_execute）的核心职责是户级动员与集结回报。然而，接收到的任务是计算Palantir Technologies (PLTR) 2022年至2024年的2年营收CAGR。此任务与本阶段的职责存在根本性冲突，无法在此阶段执行财务计算或户级动员。
updates.impact: 由于职责冲突，本阶段无法完成PLTR CAGR的计算任务，也无法执行与该任务相关的户级动员与回报。
